title: RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: MADRAS LATINO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, high-intensity residential drug and alcohol treatment. 236 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Men ages 18 and older who identify as Hispanic/Latino Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 475-5300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-5300 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, ASL by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Hispanic/Latino Community Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
